channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Man Urges Others To Watch the Gas Pumps After Spotting Something Very Strange - Yahoo
item.description:
1. Man Urges Others To Watch the Gas Pumps After Spotting Something Very Strange  Yahoo
  2. Gas pump ‘Screw Method’ warning: How thieves can steal hundreds using your credit card  Click2Houston
  3. Gas pump scam warnings rise alongside fuel prices  Axios
  4. Thieves put the screws to gas pump customers  MSN
  5. Gas Pump 'Screw Scam' Explained: The Truth Behind the Viral 'Scam' Taking Over Social Media Feeds  inkl

item.title: Jeff Bezos, Grant Cardone call for an end to federal taxes - thestreet.com
item.description:
1. Jeff Bezos, Grant Cardone call for an end to federal taxes  thestreet.com
  2. Jeff Bezos wants the bottom half of earners to pay zero income tax—he says nurses making just $75K should save $12K a year  Fortune
  3. Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark  CNBC
  4. Jeff Bezos’s Amazon Received Almost 10 Percent of Corporate Tax Subsidies Last Year  Institute on Taxation and Economic Policy
  5. Jeff Bezos says raising taxes on the wealthy wouldn’t help the average American  NBC News

item.title: Trader Joe’s Just Dropped a New Snack That Shoppers Say Is “Awesome and Terrifying” - Real Simple
item.description: Trader Joe’s Just Dropped a New Snack That Shoppers Say Is “Awesome and Terrifying”  Real Simple
